name: airess-theme
description: Four airess themes: airess bloom (rosy pink light), lumen airess (lilac purple light), midnight airess (magenta noir dark), velvet airess (deep indigo dark). ✨

.monaco-workbench .part.editor > .conten.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

.monaco-pane-view .pane > .pane-header h.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

.quick-input-list .quick-input-list-entr.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

.search-view .monaco-list-row .monaco-ic.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

.explorer-folders-view .monaco-tl-row .m.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

[lumen airess].editor.inlayHints.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
[lumen airess].editor.codeLensFontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

[airess bloom].editor.inlayHints.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
[airess bloom].editor.codeLensFontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

[midnight airess].editor.inlayHints.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
[midnight airess].editor.codeLensFontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

[velvet airess].editor.inlayHints.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
[velvet airess].editor.codeLensFontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
